name: Naspers Limited

related_entity.name: Prosus N.V.
related_entity.relationship: Naspers holds the controlling economic interest in Prosus (the international internet/ecommerce + Tencent holding). Prosus holds Naspers shares (cross-holding). Group results are presented at the Prosus level; Naspers releases a parallel summary. Naspers funds its own buyback by selling Prosus shares.
related_entity.registered_office: Gustav Mahlerplein 5, Symphony Offices, 1082 MS Amsterdam, Netherlands

sector: Technology / Consumer Internet — holding company (Tencent stake + global ecommerce: food delivery, classifieds, fintech, edtech/retail)
sens_pattern: https://senspdf.jse.co.za/documents/<YYYY>/jse/isse/PRXE/<TAG>.pdf  (e.g. 1H26 for H1 FY2026 full interim report)

document_url_patterns.period_slugs: fy-2025, hy2026 (note: Prosus uses 'hy2026', Naspers uses 'hy-2026' — inconsistent). Always scrape the results archive page for live links.

reporting_calendar.annual_results: Year to 31 March; published ~late June (e.g. FY2025 published ~23 June 2025).
reporting_calendar.interim_results: Six months to 30 September; published ~late November (H1 FY2026 published 24 November 2025).

key_holdings: Tencent (HKEX: 0700) — 23.5% at 30 Sept-period reporting; ~80-85% of see-through NAV
iFood (Brazil food delivery — wholly owned crown jewel; BRL)
Just Eat Takeaway.com / JET (Europe food delivery; acquired Oct 2025, ~EUR4.2bn)
Listed minorities: Meituan, Swiggy, Delivery Hero, Meesho, Despegar, Remitly

key_people.ceo: Fabricio Bloisi (CEO of Naspers & Prosus since mid-2024)

currency_exposure: Presents in USD. Underlying NAV currency mix: CNY/HKD via Tencent (~80-85%); BRL via iFood; EUR/RON via JET, OLX, eMAG; INR via PayU/Swiggy. Naspers share price is ZAR-translated, so a weaker rand flatters reported NPN returns and vice versa, independent of asset performance.
notes: Top JSE company by weight. Two-legged value: (1) Tencent stake, (2) global ecommerce ecosystem (now all operated businesses profitable). Persistent holdco discount to NAV (~30-35%); open-ended buyback since June 2022 (>US$41bn returned, free-float -30%, discount narrowed ~25pp). FY2026 full-year results due ~late June 2026 — NOT yet released as of 7 June 2026. Closest 'comparable' is itself vs Prosus arbitrage; not a conventional SA retailer/bank.
download_note: Binary PDF channel is proxy-blocked in this sandbox (bash curl -> 403, matching Clicks/Dischem notes). Captured TEXT sidecars via mcp__workspace__web_fetch (returns extracted PDF text). Saved: H1 FY2026 short-form (interim-reports), FY2025 Naspers summary consolidated financial statements + FY2025 remuneration report (annual-reports). Binary originals NOT saved (need Claude-in-Chrome browser download). Outstanding: FY2025 Prosus results booklet/presentation, HY2026 full statements + media release, FY2026 full-year results (due ~late June 2026).

naspers-summary-consolidated-financial-s.text_source: mcp__workspace__web_fetch (application/pdf -> extracted text; full doc saved to file)

naspers-remuneration-report-fy2025.txt.text_source: mcp__workspace__web_fetch (application/pdf -> extracted text; full doc saved to file)

next_expected_results.notes: Published ~late June. FY2026 guidance: Ecommerce revenue US$7.3-7.5bn; Ecommerce aEBITDA US$1.1-1.2bn (ex-JET). NOT yet released as of 2026-06-07.

coverage_gaps: Binary original PDFs NOT saved (sandbox curl proxy-blocked 403; use Claude-in-Chrome to archive originals).
FY2025 Prosus results booklet + results presentation not captured.
HY2026 full condensed interim statements + media release not saved (only short-form captured).
FY2026 full-year results (year to 31 March 2026) due ~late June 2026 - capture on release.
FY2025 Integrated Annual Report not captured.
